message:
test(planner): verify composite index equality-prefix ORDER BY uses seek without sorter

Add test_order_by_equality_prefix_on_composite_index_uses_seek_
without_sorter that creates a messages table with a composite
(conversation_id, idx) index and verifies that:

- SELECT ... WHERE conversation_id = 7 ORDER BY idx emits a SeekGE
  opcode to seek directly into the index slice
- No SorterOpen opcode is emitted, confirming the planner
  recognizes that ORDER BY on the second column of a composite
  index with equality on the first column is already ordered and
  does not need a temporary B-tree sort

This guards against regression in the index-ordered-scan
optimization that eliminates unnecessary sort steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
